title: NONOS publisher certificate
description: JSON view of the binary publisher certificate consumed by src/security/publisher_cert. The kernel decoder is the source of truth; this document mirrors its wire layout for tooling and review. The kernel verifies the root_signature against the baked NONOS_PUBLISHER_ROOT_PUBKEY (.keys/nonos_publisher_root.pub).

metadata.description: UTF-8 publisher description. Length-prefixed in the binary form.

valid_from_ms.description: Validity window start, Unix epoch milliseconds.

valid_until_ms.description: Validity window end, Unix epoch milliseconds. Must be greater than valid_from_ms.

root_signature.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 signature by NONOS_PUBLISHER_ROOT_PUBKEY over the wire bytes preceding this signature.
